steps.title: Find the logical relationship
steps.content: The semicolon separates two statements where the first provides a reason for the second: most light from distant galaxies is infrared, which explains why the JWST (an infrared telescope) would provide more information. The transition word must express this cause-and-effect logic.

steps.title: Match the relationship to the choices
steps.content:
Hence shows exactly how the facts connect: because most light from distant galaxies is infrared, the JWST can provide more information.

The other three introduce different logical relationships—alternatives, contrasts, examples—that don't establish the required causal connection.

That confirms D is correct.
